common.termsPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

benefits: AI-assisted workflows for modern audit teams
login.quote: The calmest audit platform our team has used.

requirements: Mix of letters and numbers recommended
trust: Encrypted in transit and at rest
No training on your client data
register.verificationNote: We will send a verification link to activate your account before onboarding.
benefits: Set up your organization in minutes
Invite your team when you are ready

forgot.explanation: Enter the email associated with your account. If it exists, we will send a secure reset link. For security, we do not reveal whether an account exists.

reset.successDescription: Your new password is active. Redirecting you to sign in…

tips: Check your spam or promotions folder
Confirm the address you registered with
Allow a few minutes for delivery
verify.resendError: Unable to resend right now. Sign in if you already verified, or try again later.
verify.expiredDescription: This verification link is no longer valid. Request a new one or create your account again.
verify.verifiedDescription: Your email is confirmed. You can sign in to continue.

status.accountNotFoundDescription: We could not find an account with those credentials.
status.sessionExpiredDescription: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.
status.invalidLinkDescription: This link is invalid or has already been used.
status.accountCreated: Account created — verify your email to continue
